title: acmella glaberrima
intro: Acmella glaberrima, also known as Parlor Plant or Toothache Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to South America. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Acmella glaberrima include pain relief, reducing swelling and inflammation, and potentially treating toothaches and other oral health issues. Acmella glaberrima can be consumed as a herbal tea or used in topical preparations such as creams and oils to harness its medicinal properties.
